overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a hooded character exploring an ancient Greco-Roman temple interior. The character walks through a grand hall with marble columns and statues, transitions through side corridors, and descends into a dark torch-lit stairwell. The environment shifts from bright interior lighting to dim atmospheric torchlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand temple hall with marble columns and statues

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the grand hall toward the central statue, observing the marble architecture

entered.detail: polished marble floor with geometric black and white patterns
fluted stone column with ornate capital
large marble statue of a robed figure holding a staff
marble statue of a warrior with sword on pedestal
marble statue of a female figure on pedestal
heavy red velvet curtains hanging between columns

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a grand temple hall with towering marble columns and geometric floor patterns. Three large statues stand on pedestals ahead, framed by red velvet curtains and ornate architectural details.

events.description: character turns right around the central statue to exit the main hall

agents.ego_description: turning right at the central statue and walking toward the side corridor exit

entered.detail: intricate circular mosaic pattern with red and gold accents around the central statue base
doorway leading to a side corridor with red curtains

segments.scene_description: The character turns right at the central statue, passing close to the marble sculptures, and heads toward a side corridor entrance. The circular floor pattern around the statue base becomes visible before the character exits the main hall area.

scene_state.functional_zone: side corridor with red curtains leading to stairs

events.description: character begins descending the stone staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow side corridor and descending the stone stairs toward the lower level

entered.detail: heavy red curtains with gold fringe hanging along the corridor walls
wide stone stairs with red carpet runner descending into lower levels
recessed wall niche with decorative stonework

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrower corridor lined with red velvet curtains, the character approaches and begins descending a stone staircase. The lighting becomes dimmer as the character moves deeper into the structure, passing wall sconces and decorative stonework.

events.description: character enters dark doorway leaving the lit area for a torch-lit corridor
character ignites a torch to illuminate the dark descending staircase

agents.ego_description: descending the dark stairwell while holding a lit torch, illuminating the red carpet and stone walls

entered.detail: large wooden doorway with stone architrave leading to darkness
flaming torch held by the character casting dynamic light and shadows
steep stone stairs covered with worn red carpet runner
wall-mounted iron braziers with burning flames
scattered rubble and debris on the stair treads

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark doorway and descends a steep stairwell illuminated only by wall-mounted braziers. At 43 seconds, the character ignites a handheld torch, casting flickering light on the red-carpeted stairs and debris-covered stone walls as they continue downward into the depths.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a grand, brightly lit temple hall that gradually descends into a dark, torch-lit subterranean stairwell. It begins by following a hooded character through a vast space of towering marble columns and geometric floor patterns, moving toward three large statues framed by red velvet curtains. As the character turns right at the central statue, the camera glides past the marble sculptures and the circular base of the pedestal before exiting the main hall into a narrower side corridor. The scene then shifts as the character passes through red curtains and begins descending a stone staircase, with the lighting dimming and the architecture tightening around them. Finally, the camera enters a dark doorway and follows the character down a steep stairwell where a handheld torch is ignited, casting flickering light across red-carpeted steps and debris-covered stone walls.
